## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Wizard or config design
- [ ] Runtime integration
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Tests

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No real company data, credentials, tokens, private keys, or sensitive logs are included.
- [ ] Dry-run behavior remains safe.
- [ ] Validation before deployment is preserved.
- [ ] RBAC, audit logging, and approved data-source rules are not weakened.
- [ ] Model runtimes are not exposed directly to the public internet.
- [ ] Cyber analyst mode remains read-only in v1.

## Testing Or Review

Describe what was tested or reviewed.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out security-sensitive tradeoffs, unresolved decisions, or follow-up work.
